data.content: Implementation review result: approved. Reviewed branch codex/7770-overview-tags at commit 7465239565c37d13f3e1ac719b9d508a744c45df against origin/main. The branch implements cleaned tag rendering, tag/setlist multi-select filtering, setlist option labels with plan id plus the first 40 title characters, and combined filter semantics. Focused tests cover tag extraction, tag counts, setlist label formatting, id/alias membership matching, tag+setlist intersection, and tile tag rendering. Sanity gates passed in the implementation worktree: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. No invariants were listed; no security or regression concerns found.
